feed.title: AO3 - Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Seven minutes in heaven
entry.summary:
Author: SubtleSolstice

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 266,453Chapters: 40/40Kudos: 891

Summary: Dick Grayson thought it would be harmless, one chill night where the Young Justice crew and the Titans could actually relax together. No missions. No explosions. Just friends, laughter… and maybe a little too much alcohol. But when a round of Never Have I Ever spirals into Seven Minutes in Heaven, Dick and Wally find themselves a little too close in the dark — and suddenly, nothing feels simple anymore. Or;Wally and Dick’s developing relationship, full of tension, tenderness, and the two of them absolutely failing to keep their hands to themselves.

entry.title: Bruce and Clark
entry.summary:
Author: TS_Rhodes

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 45,882Chapters: 15/?Kudos: 84

Summary: When ten-year-old Bruce Wayne's ride breaks down near the Kent farm, he meets ten-year-old Clark, and a friendship forms. The Kents are concerned about Bruce, since he is recently orphaned. Clark, whose powers are just starting to come in, pleads to keep Bruce as a friend. So they invite Bruce and his guardian Alfred to come back and stay the summer. And so it begins...

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne
  • Childhood Friends

entry.title: It's the Camping Experience!
entry.summary:
Author: 518Crows

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 19,782Chapters: 3/18Kudos: 154

Summary: “You know what?” Kal said, mischief gleaming far too brightly in his eyes. “How about this? I dare you guys to go camping my way. No air mattresses. No pre-made meals. No Wi-Fi. None of the million-dollar equipment in front of me.” Bruce watched every single one of his kids perk up with interest. ‘Shit.’ Not one of them would ever back down from a dare. His jaw clenched. “Kal-El,” He said again, sharper this time. Before he could step in and shut it down, Kal opened his mouth and sealed their fate. “I bet you can’t do it.” Anger surged through Bruce as determination flared in his children’s eyes. He saw Damian puff up, ready to- “I accep-” “Clark. Joseph. Kent.” The effect was immediate. Kal’s victorious grin vanished as he snapped his head toward Bruce. The room fell silent. Kal straightened, then unconsciously hunched as he walked toward him, like a chastened kid called to the principal’s office.-The Bat family plans a camping trip—something Bruce is absolutely dreading. To make matters worse, they invite Clark, Superman, his very new boyfriend. Boy, are they in for a ride. I mean, who could have known that the man was a camping enthusiast?

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: The wedding
entry.summary:
Author: Speechless_since_1998

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,247Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 159

Summary: "Was there any doubt?" Nightwing asked, with a certainty he didn't feel, wondering whose damned wedding this could be. " Well, of course no. You knew them for ages, you saw shit. You will be extra happy to be Batman’s best man.”   Nightwing felt his heart sink. "Batman's best man..." Cyborg didn't seem to notice his discomfort, and continued, "Well, congratulations. I'm still hurt, but I'm glad those two finally worked things out. And I'm happy for you. You always wanted Superman to be your stepdad. I bet when you found out, nine-year-old you screamed like a..." Dick didn't hear the rest of the sentence. A long white noise had replaced Victor's words, his legs feeling like curd.   Bruce was getting married. And Dick didn't know anything.

entry.title: Risk Management
entry.summary:
Author: extradiegetic

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,993Chapters: 3/6Kudos: 54

Summary: After an evening at a gala takes an unexpected turn, Clark’s fling with billionaire playboy Bruce Wayne goes regrettably public. To make things weirder, people keep trying to talk with him about superheroes, which really aren’t his beat. He and Bruce hardly get along outside the bedroom, but they’ll have to work together to figure out what’s missing in their lives.

entry.summary:

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,614Chapters: 1/2Kudos: 16

entry.title: Apéritif
entry.summary:
Author: unbreakabledawn

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,543Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 79

Summary: Clark's boyfriend thrives best in the cover of darkness, a creature of the night that yet somehow still seems to find his way outside during the daytime. Good thing Clark doesn't mind bailing him out, as long as he gets a kiss for his troubles. Bruce should make sure to ask nicely, though. — "Car's wrecked. I need immediate extraction to the Cave." "Well," Clark says, and adds dryly, "since you asked so nicely." He raises an expectant eyebrow, and waits. Bruce stares unblinkingly for a long moment before giving a weary sigh. "I would appreciate if you could take me to the cave." Clark gives a beaming smile. "Of course."

entry.title: The day the Earth became Krypton
entry.summary:
Author: Philis283

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 103,082Chapters: 38/?Kudos: 507

Summary: Based on 'The Kryptonians who invaded Earth' the Kryptonians have run out of Omega's due to an unexplained viruses, so the travel to planets to find a comparable species which happens to be Earth. Where Kal finds his dream Omega called Bruce Wayne.

entry.title: sweet baby
entry.summary:
Author: Jja_Jjazza

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,127Chapters: 3/3Kudos: 196

Summary: The screen is still loading the second counterpart – the second contributor to the baby’s creation. “It must be Luthor,” Bruce says. “He’s the only one stupid enough to–” The screen loads. A match is confirmed. An image flickers up. “Oh, shit,” Tim gasps. Clark Kent, one side reads in big, bold letters, and beneath it shows Clark’s latest press profile photo. And on the other… Bruce Wayne. The image for Bruce is from a red carpet event. It’s flattering, boasting all his best features, from his thick, sharp eyebrows to the soft pink of his lips. - (Babies aren't always predicted. Sometimes they come as a surprise.)

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Six Ways of Falling Apart
entry.summary:
Author: Lost_Girl_02

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,176Chapters: 2/6Kudos: 13

Summary: Only a few weeks after their escape from eight months of captivity, the Bats of Gotham have returned to Wayne Manor, closing ranks around themselves. Trauma manifests itself differently in every person, and that is no clearer than seeing how all six Waynes are reacting. Dick and Jason are going out every night (but not for patrol) while Tim and Cass are hiding themselves away, and Damian is pretending like he's fine. Bruce isn't sure how he'll be able to help his family when he's barely treading water himself, wondering if he's even helping or just making everyone worse. *** Or, 5 times Bruce couldn't help but worry about his kids + 1 time he lets others worry about him.

entry.title: sunflower state
entry.summary:
Author: floatingflowers

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,767Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 241

Summary: “What you thinking so hard about?” Clark asked, his large hand coming to rest lightly on Bruce’s thigh. Bruce blinked out of his reverie, turning to look at Clark’s profile as the man focused on the road. His curls fluttered around in the breeze of the AC, and his eyes sparkled with energy from the sun. Clark’s red flannel shirt that Bruce pretended to hate was rolled up to his elbows, unintentionally showing off his powerful forearms. To Bruce, he was the most gorgeous man in the world. “You.” Bruce replied, uncharacteristically sentimental. He was rewarded with Clark’s small, shy smile, and traces of red colouring his cheeks, tracing up to the tips of his ears. Clark didn’t respond, and Bruce took some satisfaction in his ability to render Clark speechless, but he felt Clark’s love all the same, the other man gently squeezing his thigh. “Get a room!” Dick gagged from the back, wriggling around with his seatbelt. Bruce hit his head back against the headrest once more. It would be a long twenty minutes to Smallville. Or: Clark takes Bruce and Dick to Smallville to meet his parents

entry.title: Part of That World
entry.summary:
Author: BobaTheBlackHole

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 58,731Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 69

Summary: “She was my world, Bruce… and you took her away from me.” Bruce loved Clark before he knew what to call it. He stayed close enough to protect him.Far enough to understand he would never be chosen. And when Bruce finally confessed, Clark’s answer was disgust. But love does not disappear just because it is unwanted. Sometimes, it survives the wound.Sometimes, it survives the ruins.Sometimes, it survives time itself. Even for the person who never wanted it back.

entry.title: I Used To Obsess Over Living, Now I Only Obsess Over You
entry.summary:
Author: l0s3rzclub

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 122,624Chapters: 14/14Kudos: 359

Summary: Clark, of course, knew that Bruce Wayne had been studying at Metropolis University. The billionaire was all anyone could talk about when he first got accepted. Except for Clark. He'd actually counted himself lucky to never run into the guy. From the sounds of it, Bruce was just another rich kid with a superiority complex. ______ OR: Enemies to Lovers College AU because it's so fucking good.
